meaning: n.(戏剧,故事,小说中的)主角,领导者,积极参加者
examples: Born with a dicky heart, his protagonist was not supposed to live past the age of 30.
Rebecca West wrote a good many novels and one in particular called The Return of the Soldier, the protagonist of which is also a traumatized war victim.
The protagonist Emily is endowed with the images of protecter of the tradition, and its convict, beneficiary and revolter.
As a young, black female, my protagonist, Ananiya, is the most unlikely hero for the revolution.
The young protagonist, Eddie, works days on a tree-cutting crew to support his ungrateful invalid mother.
